features.description: Connect multiple Global Amazon accounts excluding Egypt, Saudi Arabia and Turkey.
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Control or customize your inventory as per your need.
Manage your currency if selling in different regions
Link Shopify products with existing Amazon listings without hassle.
